summary: This PR addresses a race condition in the task scheduler where concurrent access to the shared `_running` flag could allow multiple tasks to execute simultaneously. The fix introduces an `asyncio.Lock` to serialise access to the critical section, and adds proper error handling for task execution failures.

findings.title: Missing exception handling in task execution
findings.description: The _execute() method can raise exceptions that are not caught, potentially crashing the scheduler.
findings.suggestion: Wrap the task execution in a try/except block.

findings.title: Missing input validation in task creation
findings.description: Task.__init__ does not validate priority range.
findings.suggestion: Add input validation for priority parameter.

findings.title: Unused import
findings.description: The datetime module is imported but not used.
